A

addCardToHand(Card) - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IPlayer
Adds a card to the player's hand.

Adds a card to the player's hand.
advanceTurn() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.ITurn
Advances the turn cycle and determines the next active player.
advanceTurn() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Turn
Advances the pointer to the next active player inside the rotation pool

C

Computes the point impact of a specific card given the current table sum.

Represents a playing card with a specific suit and rank.

Constructs a new Card with the specified suit and rank.
checkVictoryCondition() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Turn
Scans player metrics to establish if only a single survivor remains.
CLUBS - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Clubs suit (♣).
com.example.cincuentazo - module com.example.cincuentazo
Defines the Java module for the Cincuentazo application.

D

Deck - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Manages the draw deck pile using explicit Card objects.
Deck() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Initializes an empty deck stack structure.
DIAMONDS - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Diamonds suit (♦).
drawCard() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Draws the top card from the deck pile.

E

eliminatePlayer(Player) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Eliminates a player and moves their remaining cards to the bottom of the deck.
eliminatePlayer(Player) - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IGameModel
Removes a player from active participation in the match.

G

GameModel - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Represents the central game engine responsible for maintaining and coordinating the complete state of a Cincuentazo match.
GameModel(List<String>) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Constructs a new GameModel state engine instance initialized for a fresh match.
GameRules - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Pure mathematical utility class responsible for verifying card game values and assessing structural movement validity under Cincuentazo regulations.
GameRules() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameRules
 
generateDeck() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Generates a standard deck of 52 cards (4 suits, 13 ranks each).
generateDeck() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IDeck
Populates the deck with a complete, standard set of card entities.
generateSpanishCardName(Card) - Static method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Translation
Translates internally formatted card logic to a readable Spanish UI string.
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.ITurn
Retrieves the participant currently holding the turn.
getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Turn
Retrieves the participant currently holding the turn.
getDeck() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Returns the deck currently used by the match.
getFormattedTime() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TimeThread
Gets the current elapsed gameplay duration pre-formatted for text display.
getHand() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IPlayer
Retrieves the cards currently held by the player.
getHand() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Player
Retrieves the cards currently held by the player.
getImagePath() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
Dynamically generates the path to the card's PNG image asset.
getName() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IPlayer
Retrieves the player's display name.
getName() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Player
Retrieves the player's display name.
getPlayers() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Returns the collection of players participating in the match.
getRank() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
 
getRank() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.ICard
Retrieves the numerical rank of the card.
getRemainingCount() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Retrieves the total number of cards currently remaining in the draw pile.
getRemainingCount() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IDeck
Retrieves the total number of cards currently remaining in the deck's draw pile.
getRoundNumber() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Returns the current round number of the match.
getSuit() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
 
getSuit() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.ICard
Retrieves the suit of the card.
getTableSum() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Returns the current accumulated value on the table.
getTopTableCard() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Returns the most recently played card currently visible on the table.
getTurnSystem() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Returns the turn management component responsible for controlling the player rotation throughout the match.

H

HEARTS - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Hearts suit (♥).

I

ICard - Interface in com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces
Defines the core contract for a playing card in the Cincuentazo game.
IDeck - Interface in com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces
Defines the behavioral contract for the deck of playing cards in the game.
IGameModel - Interface in com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces
Defines the core operations required by any game model implementation within the Cincuentazo system.
IPlayer - Interface in com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces
Defines the required behavior of a participant within the Cincuentazo game.
isEliminated() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IPlayer
Indicates whether the player has been eliminated from the current match.
isEliminated() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Player
Indicates whether the player has been eliminated from the current match.
isHuman() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IPlayer
Determines whether the participant is controlled by a human user.
isHuman() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Player
Determines whether the participant is controlled by a human user.
isValidMove(Card, int) - Static method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameRules
Validates if playing a card complies with the primary boundary rule (≤ 50).
ITurn - Interface in com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces
Defines the contract responsible for managing turn progression and active player retrieval within a match.

M

main(String[]) - Static method in class com.example.cincuentazo.Main
Launches the JavaFX application.
Main - Class in com.example.cincuentazo
Main application bootstrap entry point for the Cincuentazo game.
Main() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.Main
 
MAX_SUM_THRESHOLD - Static variable in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameRules
indicates the maximum possible sum in the game

N

notifyHumanPlayed() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TurnThread
Notifies the thread that the human player has completed their move and the turn cycle may continue.

P

pauseThread() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TurnThread
Temporarily suspends turn processing.
pauseTimer() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TimeThread
Halts the timer increment logic temporarily by switching the paused status and breaking the current sleep block.
Player - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Domain entity model representing a player participating in the match.
Player(String, boolean) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Player
Creates a player with the specified identity and control type.
playTurnAction(Player, Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Core action allowing a player to execute a move
playTurnAction(Player, Card) - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IGameModel
Executes a player's selected move using the specified card.

R

recycleDiscardPile(List<Card>) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Restores the deck using discarded table cards during recycling.
removeCardFromHand(Card) - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IPlayer
Removes a card from the player's hand.
removeCardFromHand(Card) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Player
Removes a card from the player's hand.
resumeThread() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TurnThread
Resumes turn processing after a pause request.
resumeTimer() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TimeThread
Resumes the timer increment logic and notifies the waiting lock monitor to continue the tracking execution loop.
run() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TimeThread
Main runtime execution loop for the background thread.
run() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TurnThread
Main execution loop of the turn manager.

S

setEliminated(boolean) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Player
Updates the player's elimination status.
shuffleDeck() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
Shuffles the current cards remaining in the draw pile.
shuffleDeck() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IDeck
Shuffles the current cards remaining in the draw pile.
SPADES - Enum constant in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Spades suit (♠).
start(Stage) - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.Main
Prepares and starts the primary canvas lifecycle for the GUI context.
startNewGame() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.GameModel
Prepares match elements, shuffles, distributes initial cards, and deals the starting card onto the table.
startNewGame() - Method in interface com.example.cincuentazo.model.intefaces.IGameModel
Initializes a new match and prepares all game elements for play.
stopThread() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TurnThread
Stops the execution of the turn management thread and interrupts any ongoing waiting operation.
stopTimer() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TimeThread
Safely stops the timer loop and interrupts the thread.
Suit - Enum Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Represents the four standard suits of a deck.

T

TimeThread - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads
Independent thread responsible for handling the game's timer.
TimeThread(Label) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TimeThread
Constructs the TimeThread linked to a specific UI Label.
toString() - Method in class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Card
 
Translation - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Utility class dedicated to translating internal game entities into readable Spanish strings for the User Interface.
Translation() - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Translation
 
Turn - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model
Controls structural turn transitions and handles matching loop sequences.
Turn(List<Player>) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Turn
Constructs a turn manager associated with the provided player roster.
TurnThread - Class in com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads
Thread responsible for managing the turn lifecycle in the game.
TurnThread(GameModel, List<IAPlayer>, Runnable, Consumer<String>, Runnable) - Constructor for class com.example.cincuentazo.model.threads.TurnThread
Creates a turn management thread associated with the current match.

V

valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
values() - Static method in enum class com.example.cincuentazo.model.Suit
